name: Lam Research Corporation
description: Lam Research Corporation is a global supplier of innovative wafer fabrication equipment and services to the semiconductor industry. As a trusted partner to the world's leading semiconductor companies, Lam Research designs, manufactures, markets, and services semiconductor processing systems used in the fabrication of integrated circuits. The company's market-leading products are designed to help customers build smaller, faster, and more power-efficient devices that power today's digital world, including smartphones, personal computers, and data centers. Lam Research is a key player in the semiconductor supply chain, providing critical technology for deposition, etch, and cleaning processes.
